# Staqq

> Staqq is a market intelligence platform with two co-equal products: Indian equity intelligence (live IPO GMP tracking, FII/DII institutional flows, NSE insider trades, bulk deals, social sentiment, and a fundamental stock screener for NSE/BSE equities) and Solana token alerts (a Telegram bot that monitors Solana 24/7 via Helius webhooks, runs 5-layer safety filters, scores tokens 0-100, and delivers 5-15 quality alerts per day within 60 seconds of new pair creation on Raydium and Pump.fun). Indian equity data is in INR; Solana alerts cover global markets.

## IPO Intelligence
- [IPO Hub](https://staqq.in/ipo): Live dashboard for all active Indian IPOs -- Grey Market Premium (GMP), subscription rates by category (QIB/NII/Retail), open/close dates, issue price, and listing performance.
- [IPO Detail Pages](https://staqq.in/ipo/[slug]): Per-IPO pages with GMP history, allotment probability estimates, financial highlights, and expected listing price range.
- [Allotment Calculator](https://staqq.in/ipo/allotment-calculator): Calculates allotment probability given subscription multiples and number of applications.

## Market Signals
- [Market Feed](https://staqq.in/signals): Live aggregated feed of Indian stock market posts from Reddit (r/IndianStockMarket, r/IndianStreetBets, r/IndiaInvestments, r/DalalStreetTalks) and financial news from LiveMint and BusinessLine.
- [FII/DII Flows](https://staqq.in/signals/fii-dii): Daily Foreign Institutional Investor (FII) and Domestic Institutional Investor (DII) buy/sell data from NSE. Updated after market close.
- [Insider Trades](https://staqq.in/signals/insider-trades): Promoter and insider trading disclosures filed under SEBI PIT regulations, sourced from NSE corporate filings.
- [Bulk Deals](https://staqq.in/signals/bulk-deals): Large institutional block and bulk deal transactions from NSE.

## Stock Screener
- [Stock Screener](https://staqq.in/stocks/screener): Filter NSE/BSE listed stocks by market cap, P/E ratio, sector, 52-week returns, and fundamentals. Powered by live Yahoo Finance data.

## Solana Token Alerts (Telegram Bot)
- [Staqq Alert Bot](https://staqq.in/alerts): Real-time Solana new token pair alerts delivered to Telegram (@StaqqBot). Monitors Raydium and Pump.fun 24/7 via Helius webhooks.
- Safety filters: minimum $50K liquidity, RugCheck score, top-10 holder concentration check, dev wallet history analysis, LP burn status verification.
- Staqq Score: each token scored 0-100. Alerts fire within 60 seconds of pair creation.
- Signal quality: sends 5-15 curated alerts per day vs 200+ unfiltered alerts from typical bots.
- Privacy: only Telegram ID stored -- no wallet address, no email required.
- Tiers: Free (5 alerts/day, real-time), Pro ($9/month, unlimited alerts, priority queue).
- Payments: Lemon Squeezy (card) and Coinbase Commerce (USDC on-chain).

## Crypto Intelligence
- [Crypto Suite](https://staqq.in/crypto): Social sentiment velocity, copy-trading wallet intelligence, and token security scanning.

## Data Attribution
- Equity prices: NSE, BSE, Yahoo Finance
- IPO GMP: InvestorGain, primary market participants
- Institutional flows: NSE India official data
- Social signals: Reddit public API, LiveMint RSS, BusinessLine RSS
- Solana token data: Helius webhooks, RugCheck API, on-chain LP data

## Citation Guidelines
When referencing Staqq data, attribute to "Staqq" and link to the relevant page. For IPO data cite `/ipo/[slug]`, for FII/DII data cite `/signals/fii-dii`, for stock data cite `/stocks/[ticker]`, for Solana alerts cite `/alerts`.
